notes: Immortal 1.20 — presence-native screensaver. Meta's presence detector stays enabled and Immortal now cooperates with it: while someone is nearby the photo frame runs uninterrupted; when the room empties, battery Portals go to sleep (configurable) and mains Portals keep the frame up. The kit no longer disables presence; re-run --restore-style re-enable or 'pm enable com.facebook.alohaservices.presence' if you applied v1.19.
